title: Day 10 - Hiragana Practice
html:
Please download today's hiragana practice here: Hiragana Practice Day 10.pdf

Practising writing hiragana every day is a very important exercise to help you learn quickly. If you have any questions you can always ask other students and teachers in the community here.

To learn and practice the contracted sound (or y-vowel sounds) you can watch this free YouTube tutorial:
https://youtu.be/gjh8rHqLrfk
